subsection.heading: Purpose.—
subsection.content: Steelmark Month recognizes the tremendous contribution made by the steel industry in the United States to national security and defense.

subsection.heading: Proclamation.—
subsection.content: The President is requested to issue a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to observe Steelmark Month with appropriate ceremonies and activities.

note.p: In subsection (c), the word “activities” is substituted for “proceedings” for consistency in this chapter.
